import tomllib
import configparser
from fastapi import FastAPI, Request

app = FastAPI()

with open("config.toml", "rb") as f:
    CONFIG = tomllib.load(f)

parser = configparser.ConfigParser()
parser.read("features.ini")
FEATURE_FLAGS = {k: v for k, v in parser.items("features")}

@app.get("/api/settings")
async def get_settings(request: Request):
    return {"database_url": CONFIG["database"]["url"]}

@app.get("/api/feature-flags")
async def get_feature_flags(request: Request):
    return {"flags": FEATURE_FLAGS}

@app.post("/api/process")
async def process_data(request: Request):
    body = await request.json()
    max_retries = CONFIG.get("processing", {}).get("max_retries", 3)
    return {"processed": len(body["data"]), "max_retries": max_retries}
